---
title: "KPMP HKD analysis"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

# Prerequisites
# The following objects must exist in the R environment:
#   - ref_seurat : KPMP reference (with subclass.l2 metadata, normalized)
#   - merged_hkd : HKD Visium data (with M2Mac_fraction stored)
# The fibrosis gene set and GWR parameters are all identical to the DKD
# discovery analysis and hardcoded in this script.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(BPCells)
library(hdf5r)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(GWmodel)
library(spdep)
library(edgeR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r Data loading, Pre-processing, warning=FALSE}
# Settings
ROOT_DIR_HKD <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/KPMP_HKD_ST_data"

# put the downloaded HKD sample IDs here
sampleNames_HKD <- c("27-10087", "27-10155", "27-10170", "28-12372", "28-12518",
  "28-12545", "28-12557", "28-12613", "28-12629", "29-10013",
  "29-10380", "29-10400", "29-10410", "31-10063", "31-10078",
  "31-10090", "31-10091", "31-10154", "31-10169", "31-10177",
  "31-10210", "31-10219", "31-10221", "31-10322", "31-10336",
  "31-10379", "934-10009")

# Load and merge
seurat_list_hkd <- list()

for (sample in sampleNames_HKD) {
  input_dir <- file.path(ROOT_DIR_HKD, sample, "outs")
  
  if (file.exists(file.path(input_dir, "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5"))) {
    print(paste("Loading:", sample))
    obj <- Load10X_Spatial(
      data.dir = input_dir,
      filename = "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
      slice    = sample
    )
    obj$orig.ident  <- sample
    obj$disease     <- "HKD"   # label to distinguish from DKD
    seurat_list_hkd[[sample]] <- obj
  } else {
    warning(paste("File not found for:", sample))
  }
}

if (length(seurat_list_hkd) > 0) {
  merged_hkd <- merge(seurat_list_hkd[[1]], y = seurat_list_hkd[-1])
  rm(seurat_list_hkd); gc()
  message("HKD loaded: ", ncol(merged_hkd), " spots")
} else {
  stop("No HKD data loaded.")
}
```

```{r outdir}
outdir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/KPMP analysis for paper/HKD/"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r fixed_params}
# Fixed parameters (identical to the KPMP DKD analysis)
FINAL_FIB_GENES <- c(
  "ITGBL1", "INHBA", "NALCN", "LMOD1", "GLI2", "COL6A3", "ANO3",
  "CARMN", "PRRX1", "PDLIM3", "ANO1", "THBS2", "SULF1", "DPYSL3",
  "COL16A1", "COL5A1", "COL1A1", "NKD1", "ITGA11", "TRPC4", "EDNRA",
  "GUCY1A2", "MYH11", "CDH11", "NTM", "RAMP1", "PRR16", "PTGIS", "SYNPO2"
)

MAC_M2_SCORE_COL <- "prediction.score.MAC.M2"
GWR_FORMULA_STR  <- "Y_Fibrosis ~ X_M2 + Cov_logUMI"
f_main           <- as.formula(GWR_FORMULA_STR)

GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD   <- 0
GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD    <- 0.05
MIN_HIGHCOUPLING_SPOTS <- 20
MIN_REFERENCE_SPOTS    <- 20

QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN <- 500
QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX     <- 25
QC_MIN_SPOTS           <- 100
QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN   <- 500
QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX       <- 25

cat("=== Fixed Parameters ===\n")
cat("Fibrosis genes (n =", length(FINAL_FIB_GENES), "):",
    paste(FINAL_FIB_GENES, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("GWR formula   :", GWR_FORMULA_STR, "\n")
cat("QC nFeature   : >=", QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN, "\n")
```

```{r QC~deconvulsion}
# QC
merged_hkd[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(merged_hkd,
                                                    pattern = "^MT-",
                                                    assay = "Spatial")

sample_qc_stats <- merged_hkd@meta.data %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_nFeature = median(nFeature_Spatial),
    Median_Mito     = median(percent.mt),
    n_Spots         = n()
  )
print(sample_qc_stats)

keep_samples <- sample_qc_stats %>%
  filter(Median_nFeature >= QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN,
         Median_Mito     <= QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX,
         n_Spots         >= QC_MIN_SPOTS) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

cat("Keeping samples:", length(keep_samples), "/", 
    length(unique(merged_hkd$orig.ident)), "\n")

merged_hkd <- subset(merged_hkd,
                     subset = orig.ident %in% keep_samples &
                              nFeature_Spatial > QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN &
                              percent.mt       < QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX)
cat("Spots after QC:", ncol(merged_hkd), "\n")

# Normalization -> PCA
merged_hkd <- NormalizeData(merged_hkd,
                            normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
                            scale.factor = 10000,
                            assay = "Spatial")
merged_hkd <- FindVariableFeatures(merged_hkd,
                                   selection.method = "vst",
                                   nfeatures = 2000)
merged_hkd <- ScaleData(merged_hkd)
merged_hkd <- RunPCA(merged_hkd, assay = "Spatial", verbose = FALSE)

# Standardize sample names
merged_hkd$orig.ident <- make.names(merged_hkd$orig.ident)
keep_samples          <- make.names(keep_samples)
Idents(merged_hkd)    <- merged_hkd$orig.ident

cat("Layers after normalize:", Layers(merged_hkd[["Spatial"]]), "\n")
cat("Reductions:", Reductions(merged_hkd), "\n")

# Deconvolution (assumes ref_seurat is already loaded)
merged_hkd <- FindVariableFeatures(merged_hkd, nfeatures = 2000)
merged_hkd <- ScaleData(merged_hkd)
merged_hkd <- RunPCA(merged_hkd, verbose = FALSE)

anchors <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference            = ref_seurat,
  query                = merged_hkd,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  reference.reduction  = "pca",
  dims                 = 1:30
)

predictions <- TransferData(
  anchorset        = anchors,
  refdata          = ref_seurat$subclass.l2,
  weight.reduction = merged_hkd[["pca"]],
  dims             = 1:30
)

merged_hkd$M2Mac_fraction <- predictions[[MAC_M2_SCORE_COL]]
cat("M2Mac_fraction summary:\n")
print(summary(merged_hkd$M2Mac_fraction))
```


```{r fibrosis_score}
# Fibrosis Score
final_fib_genes <- intersect(FINAL_FIB_GENES, rownames(merged_hkd))
genes_missing   <- setdiff(FINAL_FIB_GENES, rownames(merged_hkd))

cat("=== Fibrosis Gene Coverage (HKD) ===\n")
cat("Fixed gene-list size      :", length(FINAL_FIB_GENES), "\n")
cat("Present in HKD data         :", length(final_fib_genes), "\n")
if (length(genes_missing) > 0)
  cat("Missing                 :", paste(genes_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Genes used              :", paste(final_fib_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Join layers
merged_hkd <- JoinLayers(merged_hkd, assay = "Spatial")

# check
Layers(merged_hkd[["Spatial"]])
# OK if it prints "counts" "data"

# add before AddModuleScore
DefaultAssay(merged_hkd) <- "Spatial"

if (length(final_fib_genes) >= 5) {
  merged_hkd <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_hkd,
    features = list(final_fib_genes),
    name     = "Fibrosis_Score"
  )
  merged_hkd$Fibrosis_Score  <- merged_hkd$Fibrosis_Score1
  merged_hkd$Fibrosis_Score1 <- NULL
  cat("\nFibrosis_Score summary:\n")
  print(summary(merged_hkd$Fibrosis_Score))
  print("OK: Fibrosis_Score updated (merged_hkd)")
} else {
  stop("Error: fewer than 5 shared genes")
}
```

```{r GWR}
# 1. Get coordinates (from merged_hkd)
print("Extracting coordinates...")
img_names       <- Images(merged_hkd)
all_coords_list <- list()

for (img in img_names) {
  c_data         <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged_hkd, image = img)
  c_data$Barcode <- rownames(c_data)
  all_coords_list[[img]] <- c_data
}

all_coords <- do.call(rbind, all_coords_list)
cols  <- colnames(all_coords)
y_col <- grep("row|y", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
x_col <- grep("col|x", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
all_coords$final_x <- all_coords[[x_col]]
all_coords$final_y <- all_coords[[y_col]]

# 2. Build GWR input
meta_df           <- merged_hkd@meta.data
meta_df$Barcode   <- rownames(meta_df)
meta_df$log10_UMI <- log10(meta_df$nCount_Spatial + 1)
gwr_data          <- merge(meta_df, all_coords, by = "Barcode")

gwr_input <- data.frame(
  Barcode    = gwr_data$Barcode,
  Sample     = as.character(gwr_data$orig.ident),
  x          = gwr_data$final_x,
  y          = gwr_data$final_y,
  Y_Fibrosis = gwr_data$Fibrosis_Score,
  X_M2       = gwr_data$M2Mac_fraction,
  Cov_logUMI = gwr_data$log10_UMI
) %>% na.omit()

cat("=== GWR Input Check ===\n")
cat("Samples:", length(unique(gwr_input$Sample)), "\n")
cat("Rows      :", nrow(gwr_input), "\n")
print(summary(gwr_input$Y_Fibrosis))

required_cols <- c("Y_Fibrosis", "X_M2", "Cov_logUMI")
missing_cols  <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(gwr_input))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("STOP! missing columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
} else {
  print("OK: all required columns are present.")
}

# 3. Run GWR loop
gwr_results_list <- list()
unique_samples   <- unique(gwr_input$Sample)

print("Running GWR (MYOF v2 fixed × HKD only)...")

for (s in unique_samples) {
  sub_data <- subset(gwr_input, Sample == s)
  if (nrow(sub_data) < 50) {
    cat("Skip:", s, "(too few spots)\n"); next
  }
  print(paste("Processing:", s, "| Spots:", nrow(sub_data)))

  sp_sub <- sub_data
  coordinates(sp_sub) <- ~x + y

  tryCatch({
    bw    <- bw.gwr(f_main, data = sp_sub,
                    approach = "AIC", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    model <- gwr.basic(f_main, data = sp_sub,
                       bw = bw, kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    res   <- as.data.frame(model$SDF)

    raw_p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(res$X_M2_TV)))
    adj_p <- p.adjust(raw_p, method = "BH")

    gwr_results_list[[s]] <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = sub_data$Barcode,
      Sample   = s,
      M2_Coeff = res$X_M2,
      M2_AdjP  = adj_p,
      M2_t_val = res$X_M2_TV
    )
    cat("  Done: bw =", bw, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) { print(paste("Error:", s, e$message)) })
}

cat("\nGWR complete:", length(gwr_results_list), "/",
    length(unique_samples), "samples\n")
# 4. Store results in merged_hkd
final_results           <- do.call(rbind, gwr_results_list)
rownames(final_results) <- final_results$Barcode
 
target_barcodes <- rownames(merged_hkd@meta.data)
matched_indices <- match(target_barcodes, final_results$Barcode)
 
merged_hkd$M2_Coeff <- final_results$M2_Coeff[matched_indices]
merged_hkd$M2_AdjP  <- final_results$M2_AdjP[matched_indices]
merged_hkd$M2_t_val <- final_results$M2_t_val[matched_indices]
 
print("Metadata securely updated.")
 
# count high-coupling spots
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 
sig_summary <- merged_hkd@meta.data %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    n_Analyzed       = sum(!is.na(M2_AdjP)),
    n_HighCoupling   = sum(M2_Coeff > GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD &
                           M2_AdjP  < GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_Reference      = n_Analyzed - n_HighCoupling,
    Pct_HighCoupling = round(n_HighCoupling / n_Analyzed * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Pct_HighCoupling))
 
print("=== High-Coupling Spot Summary (HKD) ===")
print(sig_summary, n = 30)
 
write.csv(sig_summary,
          file.path(outdir, paste0("GWR_HighCouplingSummary_HKD_", timestamp, ".csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r DEG_HKD}
# 5. DEG analysis (KPMP HKD: HighCoupling vs Reference)
#   - uses only GWR-evaluable spots (NA spots excluded)
#   - paired design (~ SampleID + Condition)
#   - with defensive checks

# 5.1 select samples for analysis
valid_samples <- sig_summary %>%
  filter(n_HighCoupling >= MIN_PATHOGENIC_SPOTS,
         n_Reference    >= MIN_BYSTANDER_SPOTS) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

cat("Valid samples for DEG (n =", length(valid_samples), "):\n")
print(valid_samples)

if (length(valid_samples) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 valid samples; DEG analysis requires at least 2.")
}

# 5.2 restrict to GWR-evaluable spots
sub_obj <- subset(
  merged_hkd,
  subset = orig.ident %in% valid_samples &
           !is.na(M2_Coeff) &
           !is.na(M2_AdjP)
)

cat("Spots retained for DEG:", ncol(sub_obj), "\n")
cat("Any NA in M2_Coeff?: ", any(is.na(sub_obj$M2_Coeff)), "\n")
cat("Any NA in M2_AdjP?:  ", any(is.na(sub_obj$M2_AdjP)), "\n")

# 5.3 build HighCoupling / Reference labels
sub_obj$CouplingLabel <- ifelse(
  sub_obj$M2_Coeff > GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD &
  sub_obj$M2_AdjP  < GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD,
  "HighCoupling",
  "Reference"
)

# AggregateExpression auto-converts "_" to "-", so build with "-" from the start
sub_obj$pseudo_group <- paste(sub_obj$orig.ident, sub_obj$CouplingLabel, sep = "-")

print("--- CouplingLabel counts ---")
print(table(sub_obj$CouplingLabel, useNA = "ifany"))

# unexpected-NA check (should be 0, since NA spots are already excluded)
if (any(grepl("-NA$", sub_obj$pseudo_group))) {
  stop("pseudo_group contains *-NA; check the NA-exclusion step.")
}

# 5.4 build pseudobulk counts
print("Aggregating expression data...")
agg_data <- AggregateExpression(
  sub_obj,
  group.by      = "pseudo_group",
  assays        = "Spatial",
  slot          = "counts",
  return.seurat = FALSE
)

counts_matrix <- agg_data$Spatial

print("--- counts_matrix columns ---")
print(colnames(counts_matrix))

# check for unexpected columns
unexpected_cols <- colnames(counts_matrix)[
  !grepl("-HighCoupling$", colnames(counts_matrix)) &
  !grepl("-Reference$",    colnames(counts_matrix))
]

if (length(unexpected_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Unexpected column names in counts_matrix:",
          paste(unexpected_cols, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

# 5.5 build targets metadata
sample_names <- colnames(counts_matrix)

conditions <- ifelse(
  grepl("-HighCoupling$", sample_names), "HighCoupling",
  ifelse(grepl("-Reference$", sample_names), "Reference", NA)
)

if (any(is.na(conditions))) {
  stop("Condition contains NA; check the column-name format.")
}

ids <- sample_names
ids <- sub("-HighCoupling$", "", ids)
ids <- sub("-Reference$",    "", ids)

targets <- data.frame(
  row.names = sample_names,
  SampleID  = factor(ids),
  Condition = factor(conditions, levels = c("Reference", "HighCoupling"))
)

print("--- targets ---")
print(targets)
cat("Condition counts:", table(targets$Condition), "\n")
cat("SampleID counts :", table(targets$SampleID), "\n")

# verify paired design
pair_tab <- table(targets$SampleID, targets$Condition)
print("--- Pair table ---")
print(pair_tab)

if (any(rowSums(pair_tab > 0) < 2)) {
  stop("Some SampleIDs lack both HighCoupling and Reference conditions.")
}

# 5.6 run edgeR
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

y      <- DGEList(counts = counts_matrix, group = targets$Condition)
y      <- calcNormFactors(y)

design <- model.matrix(~ SampleID + Condition, data = targets)
print("--- design matrix colnames ---")
print(colnames(design))
cat("Degrees of freedom:", nrow(targets) - ncol(design), "\n")

y      <- estimateDisp(y, design, robust = TRUE)
fit    <- glmQLFit(y, design, robust = TRUE)
qlf    <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = ncol(design))

all_results <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table
sig_genes   <- all_results[all_results$FDR <= 0.05, ]
sig_genes   <- sig_genes[order(sig_genes$logFC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("\n=== DEG Results HKD (HighCoupling vs Reference) ===\n")
cat("Genes tested :", nrow(all_results), "\n")
cat("FDR < 0.05    :", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
cat("Up (HighCoupling > Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC > 0), "\n")
cat("Down (HighCoupling < Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC < 0), "\n")

print(head(sig_genes, 20))

write.csv(
  all_results,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_HKD_", timestamp, ".csv"))
)
write.csv(
  sig_genes,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_FDR0.05_HKD_", timestamp, ".csv"))
)

cat("Saved to:", outdir, "\n")
```
